site.title: Signs | ION Print & Promo
site.description: Custom signs, banners, wall graphics, LED signs, and large format printing in Barrie, Muskoka, and the GTA. Design, print & installation.

centreText.title: Built to Stand Out
centreText.description: We're your go-to print shop for custom signs in all sizes and formats, built for visibility and durability. We can help you get started with expert consultation and design support too.

features.title: Signs are our speciality!
features.description:
Get seen and make your mark. ION Print & Promo (formerly Gibson Digital Print) offers a full range of custom signs from:

  • A-frames & coroplast lawn signs
  • Large storefront signs
  • LED signs
  • Pole banners & flags
  • Pylon signs
  • Vinyl decals

Need to go big? We have large format and flat-bed printers on-site to get those big jobs done right.

features.title: Signs built for every season.
features.description:
Outdoor signage works around the clock, so it needs to be bold, bright, and built for Canadian weather.

For hot summers and harsh winters, we produce durable signs and handle professional installation.

For added protection and longevity, most large format and outdoor signs are finished with a durable laminate coating.
features.imageAlt: Custom printed materials with specialty finishes

cta.heading: Need real estate signs and installs? Visit our Realtor Signs & Services page.
